checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a New England IPA by  Hidden Brewery (Seven Stars) at Lots Road
checkins.description: This is so good,  I’ll take another pint any time!  💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a 4 Luppoli Originale by  Birrificio Angelo Poretti at Untappd at Home

checkins.description: So good on a hot London day!!  💯🇮🇹🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Blushing Bride by  Coalition Brewing Company at Alley Cats Pizza
checkins.description: Refreshing on a hot Chelsea day! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a 420 Extra Pale Ale by  SweetWater Brewing Company
checkins.description: On a Delta flight over Canada somewhere.  This will do given the location! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Liquid Television by  Vice Beer at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Love it, but whatever you do Don’t scan that QR code!!  Fun beer and brewery!! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Sentinels of the Sea by  Kings & Daughters Brewery at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Was wanting to get into this one.  I read they had a keg down the street but was dusted in half a shift!! Taste great!! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Class 5 by  Alaskan Brewing Co. at Western State Hospital
Brooks G. is drinking an All Who Wander by  Kings & Daughters Brewery at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: This is great!  Love the story and awesome beer!  💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Busy Season by  Kings & Daughters Brewery at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Love it, always down with a solid NEIPA!! And as always amazing story and can art … just awesome! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Source To Sea West Coast IPA by  Icicle Brewing Company at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Really nice!  Always down with a collab!!  West Coast FTW! 💯🍺🤙

Brooks G. is drinking a S2N by  E9 Brewing Co. at Western State Hospital
Brooks G. is drinking a 8th Anniversary IPA by  Single Hill Brewing at Western State Hospital
Brooks G. is drinking a Similar Interests by  Cloudburst Brewing at Peaks and Pints Bottleshop, Taproom and Eatery
Brooks G. is drinking a Moral Codes by  The Lost Abbey at Peaks and Pints Bottleshop, Taproom and Eatery
Brooks G. is drinking an Enchantments Hazy IPA Series - No. 26 - Jabberwocky by  Icicle Brewing Company at Western State Hospital
Brooks G. is drinking a Castaway IPA by  Kona Brewing Hawaii at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Birthday dinner IPA. Ocean table at sunset, tiki torches, tempura tofu, Kohala Coast. Episode 47 ended at midnight on my birthday. Pele brought the fireworks, Kona brought the beer. 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Hop Island by  Honolulu Beerworks at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Amarillo and Citra bringing tangerine, grapefruit and pineapple over a solid bitter pine base. Desert island pick. Drank this on my 56th birthday week while Kilauea was erupting 50 miles away. Hawaii does not mess around. 💯🍺🤙
